trustBadges.subtitle: Solid guarantees to keep your investment 100% protected.
trustBadges.refundDesc: Time to evaluate with zero risk.

salesComparison.problemTitle: Frustrated by waiting for an answer?
salesComparison.problemDesc: You write to a business and hours (or days) pass. Personalized attention is slow, messages are lost and the client ends up buying elsewhere.
salesComparison.solutionDesc: Our AI advises instantly, sends personalized photos of your products and PDF documents in seconds.

featuresTimeline.step1Desc: A friendly agent, not a rigid bot. Understands your region's vocabulary, resolves complex doubts and guides straight to payment based 100% on your catalog.
featuresTimeline.step2Desc: 90% of sales drop after 5 minutes. Your AI responds in less than 2 seconds, closing sales before your competition even opens.
featuresTimeline.step3Desc: Zero risk of blocks. We use the official Meta API to give your business the highest digital hygiene and verification seal.
featuresTimeline.step4Desc: Your clients are yours. Full compliance with Law 1581 with encrypted and private databases. Maximum legal authority for your peace of mind.
featuresTimeline.step5Desc: Recommends products and closes deals transmitting the warmth and excellent customer service characteristic of our region.
featuresTimeline.step6Desc: Zero code. Send us your PDF and in less than a day we transform it into the smart brain of your business. It's that fast.
featuresTimeline.label: Local Engineering

comparisonTable.human1: Available only 8h/day, risk of human errors.
comparisonTable.human2: Slow response during traffic peaks and attention delays.
comparisonTable.human3: High fixed monthly operational costs for salary and benefits.
comparisonTable.human4: No capacity to attend and inform multiple clients at once.
comparisonTable.human5: Emotional and schedule dependence to provide good service.
comparisonTable.ai2: Expert and precise response in less than 2 seconds.
comparisonTable.ai3: Armored sales without information or inventory errors.
comparisonTable.ai4: Infinite operational capacity; attends to 1000 clients at once.
comparisonTable.ai5: Standardization of quality and total warmth in every message.

pilares.subtitle: Software architecture precisely designed to automate trust, privacy, and cash flow.
pilares.whatsappLink: Learn about the architecture on WhatsApp

m1.title: Algorithmic Identity and Reputation
m1.desc: Your brand has a unique tone. We train the AI to respect your voice, use your region's local slang, and build trust in every chat.
m1.modalSubtitle: The DNA of your business, now automated to sell more.
m1.modalDesc: Our engineering molds the AI to completely absorb the tone, personality, and even the slang of your brand. The result is an expert virtual seller that generates instant empathy and absolute trust from the first message.
m1.b1: Maintains 100% of your personality, charisma, and warmth.
m1.b2: Supports local slang (from your region) and interacts naturally.
m1.b3: Completely avoids robotic responses and boring numerical menus.

m2.title: Traffic with Purchase Intent
m2.desc: We don't generate noise, we generate conversions. We optimize the arrival of clients so the AI receives them at the moment of maximum intent.
m2.modalSubtitle: We turn curious onlookers into loyal and frequent buyers.
m2.modalDesc: Once the client clicks on your ads, the artificial intelligence smartly profiles them. Instead of just answering prices, our technology asks strategic questions to scale purchase intent and guide them to final checkout.
m2.b1: Dynamic calls to action depending on the client's intent.
m2.b2: Strategic profiling to close complex sales without your intervention.
m2.b3: Less time wasted on curious people, higher conversion rate.

m3.title: Data Architecture and Privacy
m3.desc: End-to-end encryption and Law 1581 compliance. Your data and your clients' are private property, guarded under banking security standards.
m3.modalSubtitle: Banking security for your local database.
m3.modalDesc: Your clients are your biggest asset and they belong to you. We structure an armored platform where every piece of data and statistic is completely protected under end-to-end encryption, giving you legal authority.
m3.b1: Meticulous compliance with data protection laws.
m3.b2: Encrypted storage on next-generation high-security servers.
m3.b3: Your clients will never be shared or leaked to your competition.

m4.title: 24/7 Transactional Autonomy
m4.desc: Exact synchronization with your real catalog. The AI doesn't just respond, it guides the client directly to checkout.
m4.modalSubtitle: Your own virtual office that never closes operations.
m4.modalDesc: We build an uninterrupted transactional flow. The digital agent manages your catalog in real time with updated prices and sends the correct billing methods without depending on fatigue or daylight hours.
m4.b1: Millimetric and instant synchronization of your smart catalog on WhatsApp.
m4.b3: Ability to bill transactions at dawn while you rest.

demoSection.f1Desc: Works even if the client makes typos, uses local slang, or speaks informally.
demoSection.f2Desc: With exact prices from your catalog. It doesn't invent or confuse.
demoSection.f3Desc: Asks for name, address, and payment method naturally and politely.
demoSection.f4Desc: Sends PDFs, understands photos sent by the client, and responds by sending photos of recommended products.
demoSection.msg1: Hi! Do you have a catalog?
demoSection.msg2: Hello! Of course. We have amigurumis, spiritual jewelry, and custom gift boxes. Would you like to see the full catalog?
demoSection.msg3: Yes please, send it to me
demoSection.msg4: With pleasure! Here is our updated catalog with real-time prices and stock.
demoSection.msg5: I like the Royal Wedding Box, how do I order?
demoSection.msg6: Excellent choice! To confirm, I need your name and address. Payment is made securely via bank transfer.

personalizationShowcase.desc1: We eliminated the annoying "Press 1 for sales". Our linguistic engineering adapts the AI's brain so it absorbs the
personalizationShowcase.desc3: that your real clients fall in love with.

t1.robotMsg: Please send your requirement to schedule a medical appointment.
t1.lemarjMsg: Good afternoon, dear patient. It will be a pleasure to schedule your dental assessment. Would it be better for you to join us in the morning or in the afternoon?

t2.desc: Relaxed, fast, and with the exact accent of your food spot.
t2.robotMsg: The cost of the order is 25000 pesos. Send confirmation.
t2.lemarjMsg: What's up! Done king, the double burger promo comes out to 25K with free shipping. Should I send them right away with extra house sauce?
